name: block/stats-cards
description: Grid of KPI stat cards with trend badges.

meta.name: StatsCards
meta.description: Grid of KPI stat cards with trend badges.

whenToUse: A grid of KPI stat cards with trend badges
Summarising headline metrics at the top of a dashboard
whenNotToUse: A full charts dashboard — use DashboardCharts
A single metric — use a Kpi card

related.name: Kpi
related.reason: Each card displays a KPI metric with a delta

related.name: DashboardLayout
related.reason: Commonly fills the dashboard stats strip

intent.a11yRationale: Each stat card is a labeled figure for screen reader context.
